data.title: Paragon Banking Group Sees Increase in JPMorgan Holdings
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from Paragon Banking Group PLC ( (GB:PAG) ).

Paragon Banking Group PLC announced a change in major holdings, as JPMorgan Asset Management Holdings Inc. increased its voting rights to a total of 5.050586% on January 7, 2025. This adjustment in holdings signifies a strategic interest from JPMorgan in Paragon, potentially impacting the banking group’s market position and signaling confidence from a major financial institution. The transaction, completed in Hyderabad, India, highlights Paragon’s ongoing engagement with global financial stakeholders.

More about Paragon Banking Group PLC

Paragon Banking Group PLC is a UK-based financial services company that primarily focuses on providing mortgage and loan services. The company operates in the banking sector and serves both retail and commercial markets within the UK.

data.title: SSE PLC Announces Scrip Dividend Scheme for Shareholders
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

The latest announcement is out from SSE ( (GB:SSE) ).

SSE PLC has announced the Scrip dividend scheme for its shareholders, offering them the option to receive dividends in the form of additional shares. The Scrip reference price for these shares is set at 1,611 pence per share, calculated based on the company’s share prices over a specified period. The maximum number of new shares that could be issued under this scheme is approximately 14.5 million, constituting around 1.3% of SSE’s issued share capital. Shareholders have until January 31, 2025, to elect to participate or withdraw from the scheme, with dividends or new shares scheduled to be distributed on February 27, 2025.

More about SSE

YTD Price Performance: -0.68%

Average Trading Volume: 3,331,113

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Hold

Current Market Cap: £17.23B

data.title: Be Friends Holding Limited Reports Strong GMV Growth in Q4 2024
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

Century Sage Scientific Holdings Ltd ( (HK:1450) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Be Friends Holding Limited announced a significant increase in its Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) for the fourth quarter of 2024, achieving approximately RMB6.22 billion, a 21.25% rise compared to the previous year. The cumulative GMV for 2024 totaled approximately RMB15.08 billion, marking a 19.58% increase over 2023, reflecting robust business development and strengthened market positioning in the omnimedia service industry.

More about Century Sage Scientific Holdings Ltd

Be Friends Holding Limited is a leading omnimedia service provider in China, offering comprehensive video application services, including live-streaming, video content production, product sales, and system maintenance for new media platforms, industrial customers, and broadcasters.

NEXUS AG ( (DE:NXU) ) has provided an announcement.

Nexus AG announced a change in its voting rights, reporting that UBS Group AG has adjusted its stake in the company to hold 5.11% of the voting rights. data.description:

Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2152) ) has shared an update.

Suxin Joyful Life Services Co., Ltd. announced the appointment of Mr. Chen Mingdong as the new General Manager, effective January 7, 2025. Mr. Chen, who has a strong background in management with various roles within the Suzhou Sugaoxin Group, will take over from Mr. Zhou Jun, who will continue as Deputy General Manager and Executive Director. This leadership change aims to enhance the company’s operational efficiency and strategic goals in the property management sector.

data.title: Bourse Direct Unveils Enhanced PEA Offer with Tax Advantages
data.description:
Stay Ahead of the Market:

  • Discover outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities using Tipranks' Stock Screener

An announcement from Bourse Direct SA ( (FR:BSD) ) is now available.

Bourse Direct announces its enhanced Plan d’Épargne en Actions (PEA) offering, which provides tax advantages and diversified investment options including French, European, and international ETFs. The PEA is particularly appealing to young investors and those looking for a simple entry into the stock market. Bourse Direct supports this with competitive rates, a high-performance mobile app, and fee-free account transfers, strengthening its position as a leading online trading platform in France.

More about Bourse Direct SA

Bourse Direct is a major player in online trading in France, offering a comprehensive range of online brokerage services, including stock market transactions and back office and execution services. The company provides competitive rates and advanced technology, facilitating optimized portfolio management for investors. Its shares are listed on Euronext and are eligible for PEA and PEA-PME.
